zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Nicholas Poyntz, 2nd Baron Poyntz of Curry Mallet於1278年出生在英國格盧斯特斯爾托金頓時，他的父親Sir Hugh Poyntz, 1st Baron of Curry Malet26歲，母親Margaret de Paveley24歲。他於大約1307年與Catherine Talbot在英國英格蘭賀福爾林頓結婚。他去世於1311年7月12日在英國格盧斯特斯爾其皮三 索德波利享年33歲，埋葬在英國格盧斯特斯爾易隆 阿克頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Nicholas Poyntz, 2nd Baron Poyntz of Curry Mallet于1278年出生在英国格盧斯特斯爾托金頓时，他的父亲Sir Hugh Poyntz, 1st Baron of Curry Malet26岁，母亲Margaret de Paveley24岁。他于大约1307年与Catherine Talbot在英国英格兰賀福爾林頓结婚。他去世于1311年7月12日在英国格盧斯特斯爾其皮三 索德波利享年33岁，埋葬在英国格盧斯特斯爾易隆 阿克頓。

variants.name: Points
meanings: from the Old French personal name Ponz, Ponce, from Latin Pontius (see Ponce ).

habitational name from any of several places called Ponts (such as those in Manche and in Seine-Maritime, Normandy), from Latin pontes ‘bridges’. This name has been established since the 13th century in Ireland, where it appears as Pounce and Pounche, and is Gaelicized as Púinse.

nameMeanings.name: Nicholas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the post-classical Greek personal name Nikolaos, derived from nikē ‘victory’ + laos ‘people’. The spelling with -ch- first occurred as early as the 12th century, and became firmly established at the time of the Reformation, although Nicolas is still occasionally found. St Nicholas was a 4th-century bishop of Myra in Lycia, about whom virtually nothing factual is known, although a vast body of legend grew up around him, and he became the patron saint of Greece and of Russia, as well as of children, sailors, merchants, and pawnbrokers. His feast day is 6 December , and among the many roles which legend has assigned to him is that of bringer of Christmas presents, in the guise of ‘Santa Claus’ (an alteration of the Dutch form of his name, Sinterklaas).

variants.name: Nickolas
meanings: Mainly U.S.: variant spelling of   Nicholas  , influenced by the short form   Nick .

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Nicholas Poyntz, 2nd Baron Poyntz of Curry Mallet was born in 1278, in Tockington, Gloucestershire, England, his father, Sir Hugh Poyntz, 1st Baron of Curry Malet, was 26 and his mother, Margaret de Paveley, was 24. He married Catherine Talbot about 1307, in Linton, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom. He died on 12 July 1311, in Chipping Sodbury, Gloucestershire, England, at the age of 33, and was buried in Iron Acton, Gloucestershire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Nicholas Poyntz, 2nd Baron Poyntz of Curry Mallet est né en 1278, à Tockington, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Hugh Poyntz, 1st Baron of Curry Malet, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Margaret de Paveley, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Catherine Talbot environ 1307, à Linton, Herefordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Il est décédé le 12 juillet 1311, à Chipping Sodbury, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 33 ans, et a été enterré à Iron Acton, Gloucestershire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Nicholas Poyntz, 2nd Baron Poyntz of Curry Mallet 1278 in Tockington, Gloucestershire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Hugh Poyntz, 1st Baron of Curry Malet 26 und seine Mutter Margaret de Paveley 24. Er hat um 1307 in Linton, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom Catherine Talbot geheiratet. Er starb am 12. Juli 1311 im Alter von 33 Jahren in Chipping Sodbury, Gloucestershire, England und wurde in Iron Acton, Gloucestershire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Nicholas Poyntz, 2nd Baron Poyntz of Curry Mallet è nato il nel 1278 nel Tockington, Gloucestershire, England, il suo padre, Sir Hugh Poyntz, 1st Baron of Curry Malet, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Margaret de Paveley, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Catherine Talbot circa 1307, nel Linton, Herefordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Morì il 12 luglio 1311, nel Chipping Sodbury, Gloucestershire, England, all'età di 33 anni, e fu sepolto a Iron Acton, Gloucestershire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Nicholas Poyntz, 2nd Baron Poyntz of Curry Malletが1278年にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアトクイントンで生まれた時，父Sir Hugh Poyntz, 1st Baron of Curry Maletは26歳，母Margaret de Paveleyは24歳であった。約1307年にイギリスイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアリントンでCatherine Talbotと結婚した。彼は1311年7月12日にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアチップイング ソドブリーで33歳で死去し，イギリスグロウセステルシュアイアイロン アクトンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Nicholas Poyntz, 2nd Baron Poyntz of Curry Mallet(이)가 1278년 영국 그루스스터실르 톡잉턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Hugh Poyntz, 1st Baron of Curry Malet(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret de Paveley(은)는 24세였다. 그는 대략 1307년 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르 린턴에서 Catherine Talbot(와)과 결혼했다. 그는 1311년 7월 12일 영국 그루스스터실르 치핀그 소드버이에서 33세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 그루스스터실르 이런 악턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Nicholas Poyntz, 2nd Baron Poyntz of Curry Mallet nasceu em 1278, em Tockington, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Hugh Poyntz, 1st Baron of Curry Malet, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Margaret de Paveley, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Catherine Talbot aproximadamente 1307, em Linton, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ele faleceu em 12 de julho de 1311, em Chipping Sodbury, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, com 33 anos, e foi sepultado em Iron Acton, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Nicholas Poyntz, 2nd Baron Poyntz of Curry Mallet родился в 1278 г. в местности токкингтон, глоусестиршир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Hugh Poyntz, 1st Baron of Curry Malet было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret de Paveley, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Catherine Talbot около 1307 г. в местности линтон, хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания. Он умер 12 июля 1311 г. в местности чиппинг содбури, глоусестиршир, Англия в возрасте 33 лет и был похоронен в местности ирон актон, глоусестиршир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Nicholas Poyntz, 2nd Baron Poyntz of Curry Mallet nació en 1278, en Tockington, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Hugh Poyntz, 1st Baron of Curry Malet, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Margaret de Paveley, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Catherine Talbot aproximadamente 1307, en Linton, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Murió el 12 de julio de 1311, en Chipping Sodbury, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 33 años, y fue sepultado en Iron Acton, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra.
